title: Adding lookup address
excerpt: Adding lookup address to the forms

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @raisecredit.co.uk, what do you mean by looking up an address, is this out of a pre-defined list, or more like a google maps lookup?

posts.author: raisecredit.co.uk (Raise)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s like a Google Maps lookup, but the one you have doesn’t show the house number, so entering the house number + postcode gives you the exact address.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: Entering a address with a house number works fine, however post codes are not supported.
